rationale: Converted the multiple-choice question into an open-ended question by removing the options and asking directly for the solution set.

variants.title: CMM-Math 开放题

rationale: Converted the multiple-choice math question into an open-ended form by removing the options and directly asking for the solution set.

variants.title: CMM-Math 开放题

variants.title: CMM-Math 开放题

variants.title: CMM-Math 开放题
variants.rewritten_question_text: 实数 $x,y,k$ 满足 $\left\{\begin{array}{l}x+y-3\geq 0,\\x-y+1\geq 0,\\x\leq k,\end{array}\right.$，设 $z=x^{2}+y^{2}$。若 $z$ 的最大值为 $13$，求 $k$ 的值。

rationale: Converted the multiple-choice item into an open-ended numeric question by removing the options while preserving the original mathematical prompt.

variants.title: CMM-Math 开放题

variants.title: CMM-Math 子题 1
variants.rewritten_question_text: 在 $\triangle ABC$ 中，$a,b,c$ 分别为角 $A,B,C$ 的对边。若 $\triangle ABC$ 的面积为 $S$，且 $4\sqrt{3}S=(a+b)^2-c^2$，求 $\sin\left(C+\frac{\pi}{4}\right)$ 的值。

rationale: Converted the multiple-choice math question into an open-ended form by removing the options and directly asking for the range.

variants.title: CMM-Math 开放题
variants.rewritten_question_text:
太极图被称为“中华第一图”. 从孔庙大成殿粱柱, 到楼观台、三茅宫标记物; 从道袍、卦推、中医、气功、武术到南韩国旗...... 太极图无不跃居其上. 这种广为人知的太极图, 其形状如阴阳两鱼互抱在一起, 因而被称为“阴阳鱼太极图”. 在如图所示的阴阳鱼图案中, 阴影部分可表示为

$A=\left\{(x, y) \mid x^{2}+(y-1)^{2} \leq 1\right.$ 或 $\left\{\begin{array}{l}x^{2}+y^{2} \leq 4 \\ x^{2}+(y+1)^{2} \geq 1 \\ x \leq 0\end{array}\right\}$, 设点 $(x, y) \in A$, 求 $z=x+2 y$ 的取值范围.

<ImageHere>

rationale: Converted the multiple-choice range question into an open-ended question by removing the options.

rationale: Converted the multiple-choice math optimization question into an open-ended question by removing the options.

variants.title: CMM-Math 开放题
variants.rewritten_question_text: 若实数 $x, y$ 满足约束条件 $\left\{\begin{array}{l}x-3 y+4 \geq 0 \\ 3 x-y-4 \leq 0 \\ x+y \geq 0\end{array}\right.$，求 $z=3 x+2 y$ 的最大值。
